Europeana uses the EDM (Europeana Data Model). Metadata is NOT stored directly on the item (edm:ProvidedCHO). It flows through proxies (ore:Proxy) and aggregations (ore:Aggregation).

Each item has TWO proxies: (1) the PROVIDER PROXY with original metadata from the data provider, (2) the EUROPEANA PROXY with normalised/enriched metadata from Europeana. The Europeana enrichment pipeline also adds entity URIs (for dc:creator, dc:subject, dc:contributor, dcterms:spatial) to the Europeana proxy.

PROVIDER PROXY pattern (for original descriptive metadata): ?proxy ore:proxyFor ?item .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?proxy edm:europeanaProxy "true" . }

EUROPEANA PROXY pattern (for edm:type, edm:year, enriched entity URIs): ?eProxy ore:proxyFor ?item .
  ?eProxy edm:europeanaProxy "true" .
AGGREGATION pattern (for edm:rights, edm:dataProvider, edm:provider, URLs): ?agg edm:aggregatedCHO ?item .

EUROPEANA AGGREGATION pattern (for edm:country, edm:completeness, edm:datasetName): ?eAgg edm:aggregatedCHO ?item .
  ?eAgg a edm:EuropeanaAggregation .
WEB RESOURCE pattern (for MIME type, dimensions, file size): ?agg edm:aggregatedCHO ?item . ?agg edm:hasView ?wr .

Properties on the PROVIDER PROXY (?proxy): dc:contributor (string) [multivalued], dc:coverage (string) [multivalued], dc:creator (string) [multivalued], dc:date (string) [multivalued], dc:description (string) [multivalued], dc:format (string) [multivalued], dc:identifier (string) [multivalued], dc:language (string) [multivalued], dc:publisher (string) [multivalued], dc:relation (string) [multivalued], dc:rights (string) [multivalued], dc:source (string) [multivalued], dc:subject (string) [multivalued], dc:title (string) [multivalued], dc:type (string) [multivalued], dcterms:alternative (string) [multivalued], dcterms:conformsTo (string) [multivalued], dcterms:created (string) [multivalued], dcterms:extent (string) [multivalued], dcterms:hasFormat (string) [multivalued], dcterms:hasPart (string) [multivalued], dcterms:hasVersion (string) [multivalued], dcterms:isFormatOf (string) [multivalued], dcterms:isPartOf (string) [multivalued], dcterms:isReferencedBy (string) [multivalued], dcterms:isReplacedBy (string) [multivalued], dcterms:isRequiredBy (string) [multivalued], dcterms:isVersionOf (string) [multivalued], dcterms:issued (string) [multivalued], dcterms:medium (string) [multivalued], dcterms:provenance (string) [multivalued], dcterms:references (string) [multivalued], dcterms:replaces (string) [multivalued], dcterms:requires (string) [multivalued], dcterms:spatial (string) [multivalued], dcterms:tableOfContents (string) [multivalued], dcterms:temporal (string) [multivalued], edm:currentLocation (string), edm:hasMet (URI) [multivalued], edm:hasType (string) [multivalued], edm:incorporates (URI) [multivalued], edm:isDerivativeOf (URI) [multivalued], edm:isNextInSequence (URI) [multivalued], edm:isRelatedTo (string) [multivalued], edm:isRepresentationOf (URI), edm:isSimilarTo (URI) [multivalued], edm:isSuccessorOf (URI) [multivalued], edm:pid (string) [multivalued], edm:realizes (URI) [multivalued], edm:userTag (string) [multivalued], ore:lineage (URI) [multivalued], ore:proxyFor (URI), ore:proxyIn (URI) [multivalued], owl:sameAs (URI) [multivalued].

Properties on the EUROPEANA PROXY (?eProxy): edm:europeanaProxy (boolean), edm:type (EdmType), edm:year (string) [multivalued]. PLUS enriched entity URIs for: dc:contributor, dc:creator, dc:subject, dcterms:spatial (use Europeana proxy when searching by entity URI from search_entity).

Properties on the AGGREGATION (?agg): dc:rights (string) [multivalued], dcterms:created (string), dcterms:modified (string), dqv:hasQualityAnnotation (string) [multivalued], edm:aggregatedCHO (URI), edm:dataProvider (string), edm:hasView (URI) [multivalued], edm:intermediateProvider (string) [multivalued], edm:isShownAt (URI), edm:isShownBy (URI), edm:object (URI), edm:provider (string), edm:rights (URI), edm:ugc (string).
Properties on the EUROPEANA AGGREGATION (?eAgg): edm:country (string), edm:completeness (string), edm:preview (URI), edm:landingPage (URI), edm:datasetName (string), edm:language (string).

Properties on WEB RESOURCES (?wr): dc:creator (string) [multivalued], dc:description (string) [multivalued], dc:format (string) [multivalued], dc:language (string) [multivalued], dc:rights (string) [multivalued], dc:source (string) [multivalued], dc:title (string) [multivalued], dc:type (string) [multivalued], dcterms:conformsTo (string) [multivalued], dcterms:created (string) [multivalued], dcterms:extent (string) [multivalued], dcterms:hasPart (string) [multivalued], dcterms:isFormatOf (string) [multivalued], dcterms:isPartOf (string) [multivalued], dcterms:isReferencedBy (string) [multivalued], dcterms:issued (string) [multivalued], dcterms:temporal (string) [multivalued], ebucore:audioChannelNumber (integer), ebucore:bitRate (integer), ebucore:duration (string), ebucore:fileByteSize (integer), ebucore:frameRate (float), ebucore:hasMimeType (string), ebucore:height (integer), ebucore:orientation (string), ebucore:sampleRate (integer), ebucore:sampleSize (integer), ebucore:width (integer), edm:codecName (string), edm:componentColor (string) [multivalued], edm:hasColorSpace (string), edm:intendedUsage (URI) [multivalued], edm:isNextInSequence (URI), edm:isRepresentationOf (URI) [multivalued], edm:pid (string) [multivalued], edm:pointCount (integer), edm:polygonCount (integer), edm:preview (URI), edm:rights (URI), edm:spatialResolution (integer), edm:type (EdmType), edm:vertexCount (integer), owl:sameAs (URI) [multivalued], rdf:type (URI), rdfs:seeAlso (URI) [multivalued], schema:digitalSourceType (URI), svcs:has_service (URI) [multivalued].

edm:Agent properties: dc:date (string) [multivalued], dc:identifier (string) [multivalued], dcterms:hasPart (string) [multivalued], dcterms:isPartOf (string) [multivalued], edm:begin (string), edm:end (string), edm:hasMet (URI) [multivalued], edm:isRelatedTo (string) [multivalued], foaf:name (string) [multivalued], owl:sameAs (URI) [multivalued], rdaGr2:biographicalInformation (string) [multivalued], rdaGr2:dateOfBirth (string), rdaGr2:dateOfDeath (string), rdaGr2:dateOfEstablishment (string), rdaGr2:dateOfTermination (string), rdaGr2:gender (string), rdaGr2:placeOfBirth (string) [multivalued], rdaGr2:placeOfDeath (string) [multivalued], rdaGr2:professionOrOccupation (string) [multivalued], skos:altLabel (string) [multivalued], skos:hiddenLabel (string) [multivalued], skos:note (string) [multivalued], skos:prefLabel (string) [multivalued].

edm:Place properties: dcterms:hasPart (string) [multivalued], dcterms:isPartOf (string) [multivalued], edm:isNextInSequence (URI), owl:sameAs (URI) [multivalued], skos:altLabel (string) [multivalued], skos:hiddenLabel (string) [multivalued], skos:note (string) [multivalued], skos:prefLabel (string) [multivalued], wgs84_pos:alt (string), wgs84_pos:lat (string), wgs84_pos:long (string).

skos:Concept properties: skos:altLabel (string) [multivalued], skos:broadMatch (URI) [multivalued], skos:broader (URI) [multivalued], skos:closeMatch (URI) [multivalued], skos:exactMatch (URI) [multivalued], skos:hiddenLabel (string) [multivalued], skos:inScheme (URI) [multivalued], skos:narrowMatch (URI) [multivalued], skos:narrower (URI) [multivalued], skos:notation (string) [multivalued], skos:note (string) [multivalued], skos:prefLabel (string) [multivalued], skos:related (URI) [multivalued], skos:relatedMatch (URI) [multivalued].

edm:TimeSpan properties: dcterms:hasPart (string) [multivalued], dcterms:isPartOf (string) [multivalued], edm:begin (string), edm:end (string), edm:isNextInSequence (URI), owl:sameAs (URI) [multivalued], skos:altLabel (string) [multivalued], skos:hiddenLabel (string) [multivalued], skos:notation (string), skos:note (string) [multivalued], skos:prefLabel (string) [multivalued].
foaf:Organization properties (from EDM.md, not in edm.yaml): skos:prefLabel, edm:acronym, edm:country, edm:language, edm:europeanaRole, edm:heritageDomain, foaf:logo, owl:sameAs.
edm:type on the Europeana proxy is a string literal with exactly these values: "IMAGE", "TEXT", "SOUND", "VIDEO", "3D". Use edm:type for broad media type filtering.
dc:type on the provider proxy is free-text with millions of distinct values (e.g. 'Preserved Specimen', 'photograph', 'newspaper'). dc:type ≠ edm:type.
edm:rights is a URI on the ore:Aggregation (NOT on edm:EuropeanaAggregation — that has a different, incomplete copy). Always use the aggregation pattern for rights queries.
edm:dataProvider and edm:country are literal strings, not URIs.
edm:year is on the Europeana proxy as a string. Cast with xsd:integer for range filters: FILTER(xsd:integer(?year) >= 1800 && xsd:integer(?year) <= 1900).

Rights classification — Open reuse URIs start with: "http://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/" OR "http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/" OR "http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/". Filter with STRSTARTS(STR(?rights), ...) || clauses.

Restricted reuse: other CC licenses (URI contains '-nc' or '-nd'). Also: http://rightsstatements.org/vocab/NoC-NC/1.0/, http://rightsstatements.org/vocab/NoC-OKLR/1.0/, http://rightsstatements.org/vocab/InC-EDU/1.0/.

Prohibited reuse: everything else, including http://rightsstatements.org/vocab/InC/1.0/ (In Copyright), http://rightsstatements.org/vocab/CNE/1.0/ (Copyright Not Evaluated), and other rightsstatements.org URIs.
Always COUNT DISTINCT ?item — items have multiple proxies and entity links.
Entity URIs (from search_entity) are on the EUROPEANA PROXY. To find items by entity URI: ?eProxy ore:proxyFor ?item . ?eProxy edm:europeanaProxy "true" . ?eProxy dc:subject <concept-uri> .

Text search on literals (e.g. title contains 'astronomy'): use the PROVIDER PROXY. ?proxy ore:proxyFor ?item . FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?proxy edm:europeanaProxy "true" . } ?proxy dc:title ?title . FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?title)), "astronomy")).
For classification queries (e.g. reuse level distribution), do NOT use nested BIND/IF over the full dataset — it will time out. Run separate COUNT queries per category instead.
Items can have multiple values for dc:title, dc:creator, dc:subject, dc:date, dc:language, etc. Use DISTINCT in SELECT.
Never query dc:title or dc:creator directly on the item URI — they are on the proxy. Always use a proxy pattern.
